classes.hypothesis: Two distinct failure modes share this signature; rule out the first before treating the second as a runtime defect. (a) Capture-pipeline regression: the visual capture took a viewport-only screenshot (`browser_take_screenshot` without `fullPage: true`), so the chart card rendered into the DOM but was clipped below the heading + table + bullets above it; the visual reviewer correctly reports `chart_card_missing` because the image is one viewport tall. Confirmed on polymarket-contributor 2026-04-30 run-2026-04-30T10-56-31-996Z: 5 of 7 prompts had screenshots exactly 3385x2097 px (= 2x retina viewport) and the failing prompts had long buyer narratives that placed the chart below the visible area; the 2 prompts with short narratives passed because the chart fit in the viewport. Fix is in the capture procedure / orchestrator agent / SKILL Phase 3b, not the chart runtime. (b) Real render bug: even with a full-page screenshot the chart card title is absent; this can happen when two chart artifacts with the same title are persisted in `Message_v2.parts.data-computedArtifacts.data` (a half-baked provisional chart plus the final chart), and the chat surface's dedupe / normalize / replay path filters out one or both. Direct DB inspection shows multi-artifact persistence does occur (e.g. line@1-row[xKey=rank] + bar@20-rows[xKey=title], same title), so the second-bucket fix likely spans preventing duplicate artifact emission in code-executor / iterative-execution, replacing-not-appending in computed-artifact-replay so later artifacts supersede earlier same-title ones, and tightening dedupeArtifacts to prefer the most-complete shape on collision.

occurrences.prompt: For binance-futures BTCUSDT, what are the latest BTC close price, funding rate, dollar open interest, dollar volume, and buy/sell liquidation dollar volumes over the most recent Velo futures rows?
For binance spot BTCUSDT, what are the latest BTC close price and dollar volume from Velo spot rows?
For deribit options BTC, what are the latest Velo options values for index_price, iv_1w, iv_1m, skew_1w, skew_1m, and dollar_volume?
For BTC market cap in Velo, what are the latest circ, circ_dollars, fdv, and fdv_dollars values?
For binance-futures ETHUSDT, is ETH showing negative funding with rising or falling dollar open interest and liquidation imbalance over the last 24 hours?
For binance-futures SOLUSDT, does the recent Velo futures structure show positive funding being paired with increasing open interest, and what does that imply about crowded long risk?
For binance spot BTCUSDT, summarize the last 24 hours of BTC spot close_price and dollar_volume trend from Velo rows and flag whether volume expanded into the latest move.
For deribit options ETH, analyze whether the ETH volatility surface is front-loaded by comparing iv_1w, iv_1m, iv_3m, skew_1w, skew_1m, and dvol_close from Velo options rows.
For BTC Velo term structure, identify whether BTC forward IV is upward sloping or inverted across the dte points currently returned by Velo.

Compare BTC futures pressure across binance-futures BTCUSDT, bybit BTCUSDT, okex-swap BTC-USDT-SWAP, and hyperliquid BTC-USD using funding rate, dollar open interest change, dollar volume, and liquidation imbalance.
Compare binance-futures BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, and SOLUSDT over the last 24 hours: which has the most stretched combination of funding rate, open-interest change, liquidation imbalance, and dollar volume?
Compare deribit options BTC and deribit options ETH: which has the richer 1-week implied volatility and steeper short-term skew according to Velo options rows?
Compare binance spot BTCUSDT with binance-futures BTCUSDT: is the latest BTC move better supported by spot dollar volume or by perp open-interest expansion and funding?

For binance-futures BTCUSDT, combine Velo futures rows, order book depth, and BTC-tagged Velo news to decide whether current BTC positioning looks like a crowded short, crowded long, or neutral setup.
For binance-futures SOLUSDT, combine SOL futures funding/OI/liquidations with SOL market-cap context from Velo to estimate whether current SOL perp leverage looks large relative to the coin size.

Build a same-venue carry and liquidity shortlist across binance-futures BTCUSDT, binance-futures ETHUSDT, and binance-futures SOLUSDT: rank each by funding attractiveness, open-interest risk, liquidation imbalance, recent dollar volume, and available order book depth.

For a hypothetical 5 million dollar BTC perp execution, compare binance-futures BTCUSDT, bybit BTCUSDT, okex-swap BTC-USDT-SWAP, and hyperliquid BTC-USD using Velo order book depth, latest mid, funding rate, dollar volume, and open interest; which venue looks least costly and least crowded?

For deribit options BTC, deribit options ETH, binance-futures BTCUSDT, and binance-futures ETHUSDT, build a volatility-versus-leverage read: which coin has the more compelling options-vol setup after accounting for perp funding, OI change, and liquidation pressure?

attribution.recommendation: 18/19 failing prompts attribute to shared chart runtime classes. Continue this showcase run by applying the local shared-runtime fix pass with the listed fix targets before swapping prompts or finalizing output.
